name: marketo-auto-recon
description: Marketo Auto Recon — point it at any Marketo instance and it inspects, inventories, maps the useful data, normalizes buyer journeys, produces 20-second seller snapshots, and continuously harvests state-change signals for action. Read-only. Zero dependencies.

scripts.demo: MSE_MOCK=1 node bin/mse.js recon && MSE_MOCK=1 node bin/mse.js map && MSE_MOCK=1 node bin/mse.js snapshot --email jane.doe@acme.com && MSE_MOCK=1 node bin/mse.js harvest --once && MSE_MOCK=1 node bin/mse.js explain
